testcase.name: test_admin_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter132_provinces_renewal.py:118: in test_admin_login_success assert r.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: 403 {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_partner_admin_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter132_provinces_renewal.py:132: in test_partner_admin_login_success assert r.status_code == 200, f"Partner admin login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Partner admin login failed: 400 {"detail":"Invalid partner code"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_customer_login_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter132_provinces_renewal.py:150: in test_customer_login_success assert r.status_code == 200, f"Customer login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: Customer login failed: 400 {"detail":"Invalid partner code"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
